---
title: ""
image: Celine.jpeg                 #upload the image on my Home page
toc: false
about: 
    id: intro-heading            
    template: trestles            #gives it a trestles template
    image-shape: round            # make the image round
    image-width: 17em             #give its width          
    links:                        # provides links to my apps with their icon
      - icon: linkedin
        href: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/CelineeUWC/CelineeUWC.github.io/settings/pages
      - icon: envelope
        href: mailto:almiar1@stolaf.edu
---
:::{#intro-heading}

## Celine Al Miari

Hello Everyone, my name is Celine and I am very excited to share my project on this website

### Education

**United World College RCN Norway**
2024| IB Diploma

**St. Olaf College**
2028| Data Science and Statistics And Quantitative Economics Double Major

### Biography 

I am a double major in Data Science and Statistics and Quantitative Economics, with a strong interest in analytical problem-solving and data-driven decision-making. Originally from Lebanon, I bring a global perspective shaped by my international education and diverse experiences. I have volunteered extensively in humanitarian settings, supporting refugees, children, and individuals with disabilities, which reflects my deep commitment to community impact. I am fluent in both English and Arabic, and I combine technical expertise with strong communication and leadership skills. I continue to pursue opportunities that integrate data, economics, and social impact to create meaningful change.

### Personal 

I grew up in Lebanon and have had the chance to live and volunteer in different countries, which shaped how I see the world. I speak both Arabic and English fluently, and I love switching between them depending on the moment. I enjoy combining my interest in data with real-life problems, especially when it connects to economics or social impact. Outside of academics, I like being active outdoors and trying new experiences, from volunteering events to group activities. I also have a playful side and enjoy humor, memes, and finding small moments that make everyday life more fun. I love old Arabic Music. The picture represent an old Lebanese Singer Fayrouz. 

### Get in Touch

 **Phone**: 5075817668
